title: Text messages
subtitle: Write short useful messages.
overview: Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: Hi, I am on my way.
Sorry, I will be ten minutes late.
不好意思，我会迟到十分钟。
Yes, I am free after three.

items.en: Hi, I am on my way.
Sorry, I will be ten minutes late.
items.zh: 不好意思，我会迟到十分钟。

items.en: Yes, I am free after three.
Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, I am free after three.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, I am free after three.

items.en: Hi, I am on my way.
Sorry, I will be ten minutes late.
items.zh: 不好意思，我会迟到十分钟。

items.en: Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
